linked_infrared_emitter_missing.description: Universal remote {remote_name} is linked to infrared emitter {infrared_emitter_id}, but that emitter is unavailable or no longer exists. Repair the issue by selecting a replacement infrared emitter or disabling send support for this universal remote.

abort.not_fixable: This repair issue cannot be fixed from this flow.

init.description: Universal remote {remote_name} is linked to infrared emitter {infrared_emitter_id}, but that emitter is unavailable or no longer exists. Select a replacement infrared emitter, or disable send support for this universal remote.
